description.value: Price 26,712 gp; Slot none; CL 7th; Weight 15 lbs.; Aura strong transmutation DESCRIPTION The head of this +1 warhammer is made from magically treated stone that is as hard as metal. A shatterstone hammer deals double damage against unattended earthen and stone objects, and gains the benefit of being a bane weapon when used against creatures of the earth subtype and constructs made of clay or stone. Once per day on a successful attack made with the hammer, the wielder can cause the target to be slowed (as the slow spell). A DC 14 Will save negates this effect. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 13,512 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells shatter, slow
